name: Catini Strawberini
lore:
Lore of Catini Strawberini
                                    


Catini Strawberini is a persian/ginger cat-strawberry hybrid created by the same person who made Pipi Potato. She is the sister of Pisi Pisi and daughter of Quesadilla Crocodila.
Lyrics (English)
Catini Strawberini. Kitty kitty bye bye.
